techniques.decision_boundary: Always runs in packaged path.
techniques.purpose: Canonicalizes user text before routing and retrieval.
techniques.safety_notes: Always runs in packaged path.
techniques.why_promoted_or_not: Deterministic preprocessing; retained as core routing support.

techniques.decision_boundary: Always runs in packaged path.
techniques.purpose: Extracts tokens, quoted entities, and intent words for downstream ranking.
techniques.safety_notes: Always runs in packaged path.
techniques.why_promoted_or_not: Low-cost deterministic signal used by ranking and templates.

techniques.decision_boundary: Used before metadata selection; no isolated score delta available.
techniques.purpose: Ranks schema/API candidates using query-token overlap and metadata relevance.
techniques.safety_notes: Used before metadata selection; no isolated score delta available.
techniques.why_promoted_or_not: Core ranking signal; effects are embedded in current packaged metrics.

techniques.decision_boundary: Execute exactly one selected plan per query.
techniques.purpose: Deduplicates and selects a single plan from deterministic planning candidates.
techniques.safety_notes: Execute exactly one selected plan per query.
techniques.why_promoted_or_not: Preserves deterministic single-plan execution.

techniques.decision_boundary: Always active in packaged SQL_FIRST_API_VERIFY path.
techniques.output_data: metadata.json and filled system prompt context
techniques.purpose: Builds compact per-query metadata/context for planning.
techniques.safety_notes: Always active in packaged SQL_FIRST_API_VERIFY path.
techniques.why_promoted_or_not: Needed to keep prompt context compact and deterministic.

techniques.decision_boundary: Always active before planning.
techniques.purpose: Classifies route type, answer shape, and domain family.
techniques.safety_notes: Always active before planning.
techniques.why_promoted_or_not: Core deterministic intent layer.

techniques.decision_boundary: Always runs; conservative API decisions remain guarded.
techniques.purpose: Fast prompt-level route gate for SQL/API need and risk.
techniques.safety_notes: Always runs; conservative API decisions remain guarded.
techniques.why_promoted_or_not: Promoted as routing safety layer.

techniques.decision_boundary: Preferred packaged strategy.
techniques.purpose: Grounds with local SQL first, then verifies with API where needed.
techniques.safety_notes: Preferred packaged strategy.
techniques.why_promoted_or_not: Best current strict score and correctness among packaged strategies.

techniques.decision_boundary: Only validated read-only SQL may execute.
techniques.purpose: Generate validated SQL for recurring local-data query families.
techniques.safety_notes: Only validated read-only SQL may execute.
techniques.why_promoted_or_not: Reusable templates are part of current SQL score.

techniques.decision_boundary: Catalog validation must pass; dry-run is honest when credentials are absent.
techniques.input_data: endpoint catalog, route policy, grounded IDs
techniques.purpose: Generate endpoint-catalog-valid API calls.
techniques.safety_notes: Catalog validation must pass; dry-run is honest when credentials are absent.
techniques.why_promoted_or_not: Reusable endpoint templates drive current API score.

techniques.decision_boundary: Plan optimizer and validators gate execution.
techniques.purpose: Builds constrained SQL/API steps from route and context.
techniques.safety_notes: Plan optimizer and validators gate execution.
techniques.why_promoted_or_not: Core packaged execution path.

techniques.decision_boundary: Executes one selected plan; no multi-plan runtime execution.
techniques.purpose: Runs validated SQL/API calls and records trajectory evidence.
techniques.safety_notes: Executes one selected plan; no multi-plan runtime execution.
techniques.why_promoted_or_not: Required packaged runtime component.

techniques.decision_boundary: Unknown endpoints are rejected.
techniques.input_data: endpoint templates and planned API calls
techniques.purpose: Defines allowed Adobe API endpoints and validation metadata.
techniques.safety_notes: Unknown endpoints are rejected.
techniques.why_promoted_or_not: Safety boundary for API calls.

techniques.decision_boundary: Packaged ranking signal; v2 tie-break remains shadow-only.
techniques.purpose: Ranks endpoint families from reusable intent features.
techniques.safety_notes: Packaged ranking signal; v2 tie-break remains shadow-only.
techniques.why_promoted_or_not: Ranking is used; broader tie-break changes were not promoted.

techniques.decision_boundary: Canary only; no measurable improvement in current report.
techniques.input_data: query vocabulary, catalog metadata, path shapes
techniques.purpose: Shadow-tests reusable endpoint/schema routing rules.
techniques.safety_notes: Canary only; no measurable improvement in current report.
techniques.why_promoted_or_not: Kept shadow-only because measurable improvement was false.

techniques.decision_boundary: Isolated search only; packaged path unchanged.
techniques.purpose: Generates deterministic alternative plans for isolated search.
techniques.safety_notes: Isolated search only; packaged path unchanged.
techniques.why_promoted_or_not: No broad runtime promotion; used for diagnostics/trials.

techniques.decision_boundary: Never changes packaged output directly.
techniques.input_data: candidate plans and strict offline scores
techniques.purpose: Scores isolated candidates and selects only safe improvements.
techniques.safety_notes: Never changes packaged output directly.
techniques.why_promoted_or_not: Kept isolated unless trial gates pass.

techniques.decision_boundary: Default-off; selected rows only in isolated trial.
techniques.purpose: Tests concise answer-shape rewrites with row-level A/B diagnostics.
techniques.safety_notes: Default-off; selected rows only in isolated trial.
techniques.why_promoted_or_not: Not a packaged default; isolated trial was below 0.75 target.

techniques.decision_boundary: Answer-only; SQL/API hashes and tools must stay unchanged.
techniques.input_data: recorded evidence, endpoint params, dry-run labels
techniques.purpose: Creates evidence-cited dry-run-safe answer rewrites.
techniques.safety_notes: Answer-only; SQL/API hashes and tools must stay unchanged.
techniques.why_promoted_or_not: Safe rows feed isolated trials; not final promoted behavior.

techniques.decision_boundary: Default-off.
techniques.input_data: route policy, SQL evidence, strict diagnostics
techniques.purpose: Conservatively skips API only when SQL fully answers and API score is not needed.
techniques.safety_notes: Default-off.
techniques.why_promoted_or_not: Not promoted; conservative guard available behind flag only.

techniques.decision_boundary: Promoted default and kept enabled.
techniques.purpose: Reduces context/token cost while preserving packaged behavior.
techniques.safety_notes: Promoted default and kept enabled.
techniques.why_promoted_or_not: Promoted because strict score tied/improved safely with large token reduction.

techniques.decision_boundary: Evidence objects only; no final-answer cache.
techniques.input_data: DBSnapshot parquet data and schema metadata
techniques.purpose: Builds Parquet-derived evidence objects for grounding.
techniques.safety_notes: Evidence objects only; no final-answer cache.
techniques.why_promoted_or_not: Coverage exists, but score impact is currently 0.

techniques.decision_boundary: Used only for reproducible local speedups.
techniques.purpose: Caches deterministic retrieval/index artifacts.
techniques.safety_notes: Used only for reproducible local speedups.
techniques.why_promoted_or_not: Infrastructure; no standalone score claim.

techniques.decision_boundary: Evidence must be recorded before claims can use it.
techniques.purpose: Carries SQL/API/local evidence into answer synthesis.
techniques.safety_notes: Evidence must be recorded before claims can use it.
techniques.why_promoted_or_not: Safety layer for supportable answers.

techniques.decision_boundary: Packed into prompt metadata.
techniques.purpose: Summarizes schema/API/domain hints for compact prompts.
techniques.safety_notes: Packed into prompt metadata.
techniques.why_promoted_or_not: Core compact context mechanism.

techniques.decision_boundary: Validators still gate execution.
techniques.purpose: Handles simple deterministic query families with low overhead.
techniques.safety_notes: Validators still gate execution.
techniques.why_promoted_or_not: Efficiency-oriented infrastructure.

techniques.decision_boundary: Prevents uncontrolled tool growth.
techniques.purpose: Limits SQL/API calls for efficiency and trajectory stability.
techniques.safety_notes: Prevents uncontrolled tool growth.
techniques.why_promoted_or_not: Keeps tool calls within packaged efficiency target.

techniques.decision_boundary: Must preserve dry-run honesty.
techniques.purpose: Decides when SQL/API evidence is sufficient or API is required.
techniques.safety_notes: Must preserve dry-run honesty.
techniques.why_promoted_or_not: Promoted core safety/answerability gate.

techniques.decision_boundary: Preserves one selected execution plan.
techniques.purpose: Deduplicates and budgets plan steps before execution.
techniques.safety_notes: Preserves one selected execution plan.
techniques.why_promoted_or_not: Efficiency and safety support for packaged strategy.

techniques.decision_boundary: Disabled in packaged system.
techniques.hidden_style_impact: No packaged hidden-style effect; compact context remains disabled.
techniques.purpose: Tests smaller context windows under strict gates.
techniques.safety_notes: Disabled in packaged system.
techniques.why_promoted_or_not: Not promoted under current safety constraints.

techniques.decision_boundary: Repair execution remains disabled.
techniques.purpose: Evaluates repaired plans without enabling repair execution.
techniques.safety_notes: Repair execution remains disabled.
techniques.why_promoted_or_not: Not promoted because repaired candidates did not pass gates.

techniques.decision_boundary: Canary only; no applicable rows changed.
techniques.purpose: Tests AST quality as a tie-break for SQL candidates.
techniques.safety_notes: Canary only; no applicable rows changed.
techniques.why_promoted_or_not: Kept shadow-only because no alternatives existed.

techniques.decision_boundary: Shadow-first; no trial-eligible positive rows.
techniques.purpose: Shadow-tests deterministic preference for high-confidence ranked endpoint family.
techniques.safety_notes: Shadow-first; no trial-eligible positive rows.
techniques.why_promoted_or_not: Kept shadow-only because projected positive delta rows = 0.

techniques.decision_boundary: Diagnostic only unless credentials are present.
techniques.purpose: Reports whether real Adobe credentials and live API payload readiness exist.
techniques.safety_notes: Diagnostic only unless credentials are present.
techniques.why_promoted_or_not: Credential visibility is false, so this remains diagnostic.

techniques.decision_boundary: Report gate only; runtime behavior unchanged.
techniques.purpose: Checks paraphrase/hidden-style routing robustness.
techniques.safety_notes: Report gate only; runtime behavior unchanged.
techniques.why_promoted_or_not: Prevents weakening schema/family routing robustness; current report passes 48/48.

techniques.decision_boundary: Applied to canaries/trials.
techniques.hidden_style_impact: No leakage flags in current canary summaries.
techniques.purpose: Rejects query-id, exact-query, gold-path, or answer-memorization behavior.
techniques.safety_notes: Applied to canaries/trials.
techniques.why_promoted_or_not: Required gate for all accuracy experiments.

techniques.decision_boundary: Runs before final answer logging.
techniques.purpose: Checks final answer support and consistency.
techniques.safety_notes: Runs before final answer logging.
techniques.why_promoted_or_not: Core answer safety check.

techniques.decision_boundary: Must stay evidence-supported.
techniques.purpose: Ranks candidate answer phrasings when alternatives are available.
techniques.safety_notes: Must stay evidence-supported.
techniques.why_promoted_or_not: Used as packaged answer-selection support.

techniques.decision_boundary: No unsupported claim should become a final fact.
techniques.purpose: Extracts answer shape, requested facts, and diagnostic slots.
techniques.safety_notes: No unsupported claim should become a final fact.
techniques.why_promoted_or_not: Supports evidence-bound answer generation.

techniques.decision_boundary: Does not change runtime behavior.
techniques.purpose: Verifies packaged outputs and final submission readiness.
techniques.safety_notes: Does not change runtime behavior.
techniques.why_promoted_or_not: Final readiness gate remains passing in winner report.

techniques.decision_boundary: Does not change runtime behavior.
techniques.purpose: Prevents credential leakage in packaged outputs/reports.
techniques.safety_notes: Does not change runtime behavior.
techniques.why_promoted_or_not: Required readiness gate.

techniques.decision_boundary: Always written for packaged query outputs.
techniques.purpose: Records execution checkpoints for explainability and auditability.
techniques.safety_notes: Always written for packaged query outputs.
techniques.why_promoted_or_not: Core observability surface used by these visualizations.

techniques.decision_boundary: LLM output is proposal-only and must pass local validators.
techniques.input_data: baseline answer and local evidence registry
techniques.purpose: Uses LLM proposals only for evidence-cited answer rewrites.
techniques.safety_notes: LLM output is proposal-only and must pass local validators.
techniques.why_promoted_or_not: Kept shadow-only; safe rows = 0.

techniques.decision_boundary: Rejects fabricated payloads and unsupported claims.
techniques.purpose: Validates claim citations, dry-run unavailable wording, and SQL/API hash invariance.
techniques.safety_notes: Rejects fabricated payloads and unsupported claims.
techniques.why_promoted_or_not: Safe rows feed isolated trials only.

techniques.decision_boundary: Does not overwrite official packaged outputs.
techniques.hidden_style_impact: Hidden-style gate passed in trial summary.
techniques.output_data: best isolated score and gate results
techniques.purpose: Runs isolated packaged-style trials over safe candidate bundles.
techniques.safety_notes: Does not overwrite official packaged outputs.
techniques.why_promoted_or_not: Best isolated score improved but target 0.75 was not reached.
